_note: Simplified prototype rules. Accurate at category level; verify exact legal text before production.

gst.note: GST registration generally required only if annual turnover exceeds threshold. Most small/SHG sellers are below it and exempt. Some marketplaces still request a GSTIN except for notified exempt categories.

handloom_textiles.notes: Legal Metrology labeling applies to pre-packaged goods. No special license for basic sale.

food.notes: FSSAI registration mandatory for any food business; license tier depends on turnover. Perishable — prefer regional fulfilment.

jewellery_precious.notes: BIS hallmarking mandatory for gold/silver articles.

imitation_jewellery.notes: No hallmark required; standard pre-packaged labeling applies.

cosmetics_soap.notes: Cosmetics regulated under CDSCO; small-scale makers may need manufacturing registration. Verify.

handicrafts_decor.notes: Generally no special license; standard labeling applies. Often fragile — protective packing.
